name: Kamala HQ
subject: Even if we’re outraised
body:
We got some major news this morning: Bernie Sanders raised over $18
million in the first quarterly fundraising period of this campaign.

If we’re
going to keep up the pace in this crowded field of candidates, we need to
work hard to cut through the noise and amplify Kamala’s positive message.

Our campaign isn’t
taking a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, just people.
Kamala’s counting on folks like you to power this fight. Will you make
your first contribution to Kamala’s campaign for president
today?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema190402-fec?refcode=ema190402-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1001&refcode2=4214_5755789_vMk2jx&akid=4214%2E5755789%2EvMk2jx ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema190402-fec?refcode=ema190402-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=1002&refcode2=4214_5755789_vMk2jx&akid=4214%2E5755789%2EvMk2jx ]Chip in $25 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema190402-fec?refcode=ema190402-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=1003&refcode2=4214_5755789_vMk2jx&akid=4214%2E5755789%2EvMk2jx ]Chip in $50 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema190402-fec?refcode=ema190402-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=1004&refcode2=4214_5755789_vMk2jx&akid=4214%2E5755789%2EvMk2jx ]Chip in $100 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema190402-fec?refcode=ema190402-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1005&refcode2=4214_5755789_vMk2jx&akid=4214%2E5755789%2EvMk2jx ]Chip in $250 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema190402-fec?refcode=ema190402-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1006&refcode2=4214_5755789_vMk2jx&akid=4214%2E5755789%2EvMk2jx ]Another Amount

Here’s the truth: a lot of candidates in this race are going to raise a
lot of money. That’s ok. We may be outraised, but we will not be
outworked.

The $12 million our people-powered campaign raised in the first quarter is
already making a huge impact as we set the budget for the months ahead.

We’re expanding our organizing efforts in early states and planning big
investments in the grassroots infrastructure that’s going to win this
election.

All of that work is powered by people. Not a dime or dollar from a single
corporate PAC or federal lobbyists, just everyday people working hard for
Kamala.

Contribute today to Kamala’s campaign for president today to make sure we
keep up this momentum:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema190402-fec?refcode=ema190402-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1007&refcode2=4214_5755789_vMk2jx&akid=4214%2E5755789%2EvMk2jx ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema190402-fec?refcode=ema190402-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=1008&refcode2=4214_5755789_vMk2jx&akid=4214%2E5755789%2EvMk2jx ]Chip in $25 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema190402-fec?refcode=ema190402-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=1009&refcode2=4214_5755789_vMk2jx&akid=4214%2E5755789%2EvMk2jx ]Chip in $50 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema190402-fec?refcode=ema190402-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=1010&refcode2=4214_5755789_vMk2jx&akid=4214%2E5755789%2EvMk2jx ]Chip in $100 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema190402-fec?refcode=ema190402-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1012&refcode2=4214_5755789_vMk2jx&akid=4214%2E5755789%2EvMk2jx ]Another Amount

Thanks for all you do.

— Team Kamala

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://action.kamalaharris.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=4214%2E5755789%2EvMk2jx

name: [IMPORTANT] Mike Thompson
subject: We must take a stand
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
| **2,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED:

Tell Mitch McConnell to give Universal Background Checks a vote in the Senate!**

[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/AhxyxADyUInL2peayGgdE62FkpFBB-KRSSCaNZ2yk48=/fg7bjCHNY6-eDrSLy8j5SwFX0Ry7Yod5PNKlCDaO0-E=)
---

Peter,

I was proud to introduce historic legislation to require background checks on every firearm purchase - and last month, my House colleagues answered the call of the American people and passed this important measure.

Now, Senator Mitch McConnell won't even bring it to a vote in the Senate.

**Americans have made it very clear that they support universal background checks.[Will you add your name to our petition and demand McConnell bring background checks up for a vote in the Senate?](https://act.myngp.com/el/AhxyxADyUInL2peayGgdE62FkpFBB-KRSSCaNZ2yk48=/fg7bjCHNY6-eDrSLy8j5SwFX0Ry7Yod5PNKlCDaO0-E=)**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/AhxyxADyUInL2peayGgdE62FkpFBB-KRSSCaNZ2yk48=/fg7bjCHNY6-eDrSLy8j5SwFX0Ry7Yod5PNKlCDaO0-E=)
I've worked hard with colleagues on both sides of the aisle to pass this important legislation to make our communities safer from the threat of gun violence.

We can't let McConnell be the roadblock on our path to the first serious action on common sense gun violence prevention by Congress in 25 years.

[**Let 's keep up the pressure on Senate Republicans to keep this legislation moving. Add your name right away!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/AhxyxADyUInL2peayGgdE62FkpFBB-KRSSCaNZ2yk48=/fg7bjCHNY6-eDrSLy8j5SwFX0Ry7Yod5PNKlCDaO0-E=)

Thanks for all you do,

Mike

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/AhxyxADyUInL2peayGgdE62FkpFBB-KRSSCaNZ2yk48=/fg7bjCHNY6-eDrSLy8j5SwFX0Ry7Yod5PNKlCDaO0-E=)
* * *
_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/AhxyxADyUInL2peayGgdE62FkpFBB-KRSSCaNZ2yk48=/Ts8vJLgwoUmG8u8mMGc48aHcIjCKeBYHOZfR7CbkSDo=?amount=15&recurring=true&refcode=MT_EM_JA_90DO_190403_1_1&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)_

_We believe that communicating with our supporters is a vital part of our campaign. However, if you want to keep supporting Mike while receiving fewer emails,[_**click here.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/AhxyxADyUInL2peayGgdE62FkpFBB-KRSSCaNZ2yk48=/PMDkZ-RZM5DP-WCaZEQB_qEaOTU4ahw25WnTTv_fUHA=)_

Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
---
Mike Thompson for Congress
PO Box 10541
Napa CA 94581 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](http://mikethompsonforcongress.ngpvanhost.com/unsubscribe?mmid=AhxyxADyUInL2peayGgdE62FkpFBB-KRSSCaNZ2yk48=&tiid=oGH7pZbqE-gVfe1Hg_whxRo__2vHdozpA9nWUcmEcnk=).

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Will you join me tomorrow night in Manassas?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
There is a special election here in Virginia in less than a week. --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek:

There is a special election here in Virginia in less than a week -- and I'm asking for your help so we can win it!

Democrat Victor Angry served his country for 23 years on active duty as the first African American Command Sergeant Major of the Army National Guard. Once he retired, he became a Dale City Volunteer Firefighter, motivational speaker, and leadership development instructor -- **and now, he's ready to continue serving his community as the Prince William County Supervisor of Neabsco District.**

Victor would be a great leader for Prince William County -- and his win would make history as the first African American to serve on the PWC Board of Supervisors. I know that he's the kind of person we want representing our communities, which is why I'm proud to be hosting an event in support of his campaign tomorrow, Thursday, April 4th, at 6:00 PM.

**Will you join me?** [**You can get the event details and RSVP at this link.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f174c/3e0906/7b8c624c/3e30a16f/117135696/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk4vica?source=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC&refcode=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+You+can+get+the+event+details+and+RSVP+a&utm_campaign=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC")

If you can't make it in person tomorrow, you can still support Victor with an online donation to help power him through critical Get Out the Vote efforts. [**Click here to pitch in whatever you can.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f174c/3e0906/7b8c624c/3e30a16e/117135696/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victorangry?source=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC&amount=25&refcode=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+pitch+in+whatever+you+can&utm_campaign=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC")

We need everyone coming together to support great Democratic candidates like Victor. I hope to see you tomorrow night!

-Tim

P.S. If you live in Neabsco District, don't forget to go vote on Tuesday! You can get all the information you need about when, how, and where to vote [**here**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f174c/3e0906/7b8c624c/3e30a16c/117135696/VEsF/ "http://www.pwcgov.org/news/pages/What-Neabsco-District-Voters-Should-Know-About-Special-Election.aspx?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+here&utm_campaign=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC&source=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC"). **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** ****
---
* * *
|
---
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f174c/3e0906/7b8c624c/3e30a162/117135696/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC&source=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f174c/3e0906/7b8c624c/3e30a164/117135696/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC&source=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f174c/3e0906/7b8c624c/3e30a178/117135696/VEsA/ "https://www.instagram.com/timkaine/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC&source=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC")

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [**clicking here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f174c/3e0906/7b8c624c/3e30a17d/117135696/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/update-your-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC&source=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for Tim to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f174c/3e0906/7b8c624c/3e30a176/117135696/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC&source=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC")

Team Kaine is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your sustained support is critical to Tim. If you'd like to donate, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f174c/3e0906/7b8c624c/3e30a14e/117135696/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-support?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC&source=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC") Thanks for having Tim's back!

P.O. Box 239
Alexandria, VA 22313-0239

[Unsubscribe](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f174c/3e0906/7b8c624c/3e30a144/117135696/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+Unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC&source=20190403_1_FIN_TK_PWC")

| | Paid for by Kaine for Virginia

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Securing Southern Border is President Trump’s Obligation
body:
"Protecting the sovereignty and security of the United States are responsibilities of the commander in chief." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1422307621&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Securing Southern Border is President Trump’s Obligation**

“Protecting the sovereignty and security of the United States are responsibilities of the commander in chief and if those elements are being compromised by an influx of immigrants at the southern border, President Trump must use the tools at his discretion to remedy the matter,” the _Boston Herald_ editorial board writes.

Border apprehensions are skyrocketing according to Border Patrol officials, with more than 12,000 people in custody right now.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=11649a927c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Companies work painstakingly to earn consumer trust. But when you purchase brand-name goods through online third-party marketplaces like Alibaba, Amazon and eBay, there’s a good chance you’ll end up with a counterfeit,” Director of the White House Office of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro writes in _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2d83946905&e=3ee4985eea)_. Today, “President Trump will sign a presidential memorandum to help protect American consumers, manufacturers and factory workers from counterfeiting.”
---
|
---
| “The left-leaning news media has suffered a serious blow to its credibility and to its influence,” Liz Peek writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5b227d3813&e=3ee4985eea). “A recent CBS poll revealed just how significant the damage is, showing that 54 percent of the country believes Mueller’s investigation was politically motivated”—despite the “steady diet of baloney [from the media] tying the White House to the Kremlin.”
---
|
---
| In the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ef5651caf8&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Erin Dunne writes that President Trump has taken criminal justice reform in the right direction, including by championing the bipartisan First Step Act. “If the first step was getting more people out of prison, the second step is helping those people get jobs — and that's exactly what President Trump said he plans on doing.”
---
|
---
| “The White House is exploring all executive authorities in existing law that will allow an aggressive crackdown on illegal immigration and legal immigration fraud, senior adviser to the president Stephen Miller told _[The Daily Caller](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8a84349722&e=3ee4985eea)_ in an exclusive telephone interview,” Saagar Enjeti reports. “Now that this crisis is upon us, it’s the time to take that effort to the next level,” Miller says.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fac5ddc69e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b641b404a5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=d45a2d6964)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Border apprehensions are skyrocketing according to Border Patrol officials, with more than 12,000 people in custody right now. | | “Companies work painstakingly to earn consumer trust. But when you purchase brand-name goods through online third-party marketplaces like Alibaba, Amazon and eBay, there’s a good chance you’ll end up with a counterfeit,” Director of the White House Office of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro writes in . Today, “President Trump will sign a presidential memorandum to help protect American consumers, manufacturers and factory workers from counterfeiting.” | | “The left-leaning news media has suffered a serious blow to its credibility and to its influence,” Liz Peek writes in . “A recent CBS poll revealed just how significant the damage is, showing that 54 percent of the country believes Mueller’s investigation was politically motivated”—despite the “steady diet of baloney [from the media] tying the White House to the Kremlin.” | | In the , Erin Dunne writes that President Trump has taken criminal justice reform in the right direction, including by championing the bipartisan First Step Act. “If the first step was getting more people out of prison, the second step is helping those people get jobs — and that's exactly what President Trump said he plans on doing.” | | “The White House is exploring all executive authorities in existing law that will allow an aggressive crackdown on illegal immigration and legal immigration fraud, senior adviser to the president Stephen Miller told in an exclusive telephone interview,” Saagar Enjeti reports. “Now that this crisis is upon us, it’s the time to take that effort to the next level,” Miller says. | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I am asking you to do something today that you will remember decades from now
body:
The future of our country and the world is dependent upon which side wins this struggle.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=936%2E150750%2E6PZEv4)

Sisters and Brothers -
First, thank you very much for the great support you've given our campaign since we announced six weeks ago. During that period more than 1 million people have agreed to roll up their sleeves and volunteer, more than 500,000 have made financial contributions and tens of thousands have attended our campaign rallies in states throughout the country.
We're off to a great start but if we're going to win the Democratic nomination, defeat Trump and transform our country, there's a heck of a lot more that needs to be done.
I don't have to tell you that this is a pivotal and momentous time for our nation and for the entire planet, and that there is a monumental clash taking place right now between two very different political visions.
And not to get you too nervous, but the future of our country and the world is dependent upon which side wins that struggle.
That means that if there has ever been a time in American history when our people must stand together in the fight for economic, social, racial and environmental justice – now is that time. In other words, we need to create an unprecedented grassroots political movement.
**On April 27 we take our next big step in that effort. On April 27 we are going to do something you will remember decades from now.**
That is the day we are hosting Organizing Kickoff events in every state in the country, events which will lay the foundation for our grassroots campaign.
And what I am asking you to do today is to say that you will host one of these events.
Now, I understand that maybe many of you have never hosted an event like this before, but not only is it critically important, it is also quite easy. I know that you can do it, because tens of thousands of people did it successfully as part of our last campaign. And shortly after you add your name to say that you will, a member of our team will reach out to make sure you have any support you need along the way.
This is the means by which we bring millions of Americans together to help transform our society. So what do you say?
[Please add your name to say you’re willing to host an Organizing Kickoff event on April 27. If we are organized, if we can bring millions of people into our movement, we’re going to win this election. So please, say you’re in.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/organizing-kickoff/?source=em190403-1-120&t=2&akid=936%2E150750%2E6PZEv4)
Maintaining a vibrant democracy based on the principles of justice has never been easy. And in these dangerous and unprecedented times, it may be more difficult than ever.
But we are going to defeat Donald Trump and transform this country not because I am a billionaire or because we have a super PAC funded by billionaires. **We are going to win this election and transform this country because we will put together the strongest grassroots coalition in the history of American politics.**
I have said it before and I will say it again: real change always takes place from the bottom on up, not the top on down. That’s the kind of process I will always fight for — on this campaign and in the White House — because it is what I believe from the bottom of my heart.
We start at the community level, then we go to the state level, and then the national level. And today I am asking you to be an integral part of that effort, because ultimately creating change starts with you. So I am asking:
**Add your name to say you’ll host an Organizing Kickoff event on April 27:**
[https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/organizing-kickoff](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/organizing-kickoff/?source=em190403-1-120&t=3&akid=936%2E150750%2E6PZEv4)
On April 27, we are going to bring people together from all across this country to take the next step in building an unprecedented grassroots movement from coast to coast. A movement which has the courage to take on the powerful special interests that dominate the economic and political life of our country.
Thank you for saying you will take a leadership role in that struggle.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
* * *

**Add your name to say you’re willing to host an Organizing Kickoff event on April 27. If we are organized, we will win. When we are divided, the big-money interests win. So let’s get organized.**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/organizing-kickoff/?source=em190403-1-120&t=4&akid=936%2E150750%2E6PZEv4)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe using this link**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=936%2E150750%2E6PZEv4). If you want to receive fewer emails, [just tell us here](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=936%2E150750%2E6PZEv4). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=936_150750_6PZEv4&akid=936%2E150750%2E6PZEv4).

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Share your thoughts with me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
I’m reaching out to you now because I need your input as our campaign enters its next phase. The coming months will be critical. We’re making big investments in grassroots organizing to build this campaign from the ground up. I will be on the campaign trail in key states to keep sharing our positive message and platform with voters. And in June, I’ll be taking the debate stage to share more of our ideas with the nation and contrast our campaign with others in the race. **As my team and I work to put together our strategy for the coming months, I want to make sure your voice is heard.** **[Can you complete our short April survey to share your input with me? Among other things, I want to hear what you think about the challenges we face, what’s driving your decision in this election, and what has you excited about 2020.](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-petition-190402-april-survey?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190403-full&source=ema190403-full&t=1&akid=4218%2E5755789%2EabIcuQ)** | | [ Take the survey ](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-petition-190402-april-survey?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190403-full&source=ema190403-full&t=2&akid=4218%2E5755789%2EabIcuQ)
---
We are running a campaign we can all be proud of -- because it’s about people. Ours is truly a campaign of, by and for the people. All the hard work we are doing to win this election is personal.
That’s why it’s so important that my team and I hear directly from you about the issues that matter to you, your family, and your community. Online surveys like this one are tremendously helpful -- they let me and my team know what’s on your mind.
**[So please, if you can, take a few minutes to fill out our April survey.**](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-petition-190402-april-survey?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190403-full&source=ema190403-full&t=3&akid=4218%2E5755789%2EabIcuQ)
| [ Take the survey ](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-petition-190402-april-survey?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190403-full&source=ema190403-full&t=4&akid=4218%2E5755789%2EabIcuQ)
---
Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts with me.
For The People,
— Kamala Harris

PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). You received this message because you are subscribed to Senator Kamala Harris' mailing list.
You can [adjust your email preferences here](https://action.kamalaharris.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=4218%2E5755789%2EabIcuQ), or [unsubscribe from receiving further emails here.](https://action.kamalaharris.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=4218%2E5755789%2EabIcuQ)

name: Dr. James Zogby, The Sanders Institute
subject: Civil Rights, Immigration & Human Dignity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
# [](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a552/bed43eb/995a7208/75fb45d5/969629190/VEsH/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com")
###### _"We have to see every single human being wherever they are from and whoever they are as being equal and deserving of rights." -Dr. James Zogby_
Friend,
Civil rights, immigration, climate change, and the economy - all are connected and tied directly to the issues of justice and human rights.‬
For too long, our society has compartmentalized these fundamental concerns, failing to recognize or even understand how they impacted each other. This has been true not only of governments, because too often, in the past, even activists didn't make the connections.
**[Click here or on the image below to watch the panel.‬](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a552/bed43eb/995a7208/75fb45d4/969629190/VEsE/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/civil-rights-immigration-and-human-dignity")**
[](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a552/bed43eb/995a7208/75fb45d4/969629190/VEsF/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/civil-rights-immigration-and-human-dignity")
At the Sanders Institute Gathering, I was honored to moderate a panel on civil rights, immigration, and human dignity with Dr. Radhika Balakrishnan, Representative Tulsi Gabbard, Susan Sarandon, and Ben Jealous. We talked about how climate change and economic injustice are creating conflicts across the world and contributing to mass migration. This, in turn, has impacted several countries fostering xenophobic far-right movements. We discussed the importance of judging a country's economy, not on how large it is, but on whether it is just and meets the test of providing equal opportunity for all. And we talked about the history of our own nation and how genocide against indigenous peoples, indentured servitude, slavery, and disenfranchisement defined our beginning and still shape our social and our political realities.‬
We concluded by recognizing the need to demonstrate this interconnectedness and to come together to fight for a better future for all of us - no matter what race, what gender, what age, or what country we come from or who our parents were.‬
What The Gathering made clear to us all was the need to come together and understand the interconnectedness of the challenges we face in order to find the path forward.‬
In Solidarity,
Dr. James Zogby‬
Founder, Arab American Institute
Founding Fellow, The Sanders Institute
PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
131 CHURCH STREET
BURLINGTON, VT 05401

The Sanders Institute is a tax-exempt 501(c)(3) organization.
The Sanders Institute will be suspending operations in May 2019.
131 Church Street, Burlington, VT 05401
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a552/bed43eb/995a7208/75fb45d7/969629190/VEsC/ "https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")

subject: A sincere thank you

body:

It's run by supporters like you chipping in when they can. We've got 19 months to go. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: This is what our southern border actually looks like
body:
Democrats claim that replacing existing barriers on our border isn’t necessary. Maybe they haven't seen how these old fence sections actually work. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b677137013&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 3, 2019
---
| | |
# **This is what our southern border actually looks like**

**Congressional Democrats** claim that replacing existing barriers on our southern border isn’t necessary. Maybe they haven't seen how these old fence sections actually work.

**In just one example,** on December 22, smugglers pushed a group of adults and children through a hole in the Sanchez Canal border infrastructure—an area of the wall that’s partially underwater. These smugglers profit off thousands of children brought along by adults on this terrifying journey.
🎬 [Watch: Smugglers push children underwater to cross the border](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a98aa1370c&e=3ee4985eea)
**The Trump Administration** is treating the crisis on our southern border as the true national emergency that it is. Last night, Homeland Security Secretary Kirstjen Nielsen explained how U.S. law enforcement has broken up so-called “child recycling rings,” a horrid practice where smugglers kidnap children, give them to adults to cross the border posing as a family, and pass them back to other illegal immigrants, repeating the process.

**“The smugglers** . . . they are sicker than we have ever seen before,” Secretary Nielsen says.

**Meanwhile, border apprehensions** are skyrocketing, and U.S. facilities are overwhelmed. In February, more than 76,000 people crossed the border without authorization, the highest number in more than a decade. Today, we are quickly approaching a new era of 100,000 or more illegal immigrants apprehended per month.

**A long-term solution** can come only from Congress, but the Trump Administration is using the full extent of its executive authority to address the immediate crisis. This week, the Department of Homeland Security announced that 750 personnel would be temporarily reassigned to the southwest border. “We are doing everything we can to simply avoid a tragedy in a CBP facility,” U.S. Customs and Border Protection Commissioner Kevin McAleenan says.

**President Trump** is also using his presidential authority to properly enforce the immigration laws passed—and then ignored—by Congress. His national emergency declaration allocates up to $3.6 billion for barrier construction along our southwest border.

**That’s good** , because the state of America’s border is a disgrace for a modern republic.

**[Breaking: Illegal immigrant arrested on 100+ child sex crime charges](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e67a9ca63e&e=3ee4985eea)**
---
|
---
|
## **The new NATO under President Trump**

**Yesterday,** President Trump welcomed NATO Secretary General Jens Stoltenberg to the White House, commemorating tomorrow’s 70th anniversary of the North Atlantic Treaty Organization.

**“Over the past two years,** the Secretary General and I have developed a very strong working relationship. It’s been as good as it can be,” the President said yesterday. “We’re both committed to ensuring that NATO can address the full range of threats facing the Alliance today.”

**From day one,** President Trump promised that America would no longer foot the bill for NATO while other countries shirked their obligations. The message to our allies in Europe was simple: They should care about our collective security just as much as the United States does.

**Message received**. Since 2016, our NATO allies have added more than $40 billion in defense investments. By 2020, that figure will reach $100 billion.

[Watch: President Trump meets with the Secretary General of NATO](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9ab8392e25&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by D. Myles Cullen
| **President Donald J. Trump meets with NATO Secretary General Jens Stoltenberg** | April 2, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=592773b8c2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=22db2d2dc6&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=1d9c60bee1)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Blog Update 4.3.19
body:
Where the Democrats Want to Take Us No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jilujjil-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jilujjil-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jilujjil-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Where the Democrats Want to Take Us](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jilujjil-kujkulhluu-j/)

## [Exoneration](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jilujjil-kujkulhluu-d/)
We've had a couple of days for it to sink in now. Special Counsel Robert Mueller finally delivered his verdict on alleged collusion between the Trump campaign and the Russians. And Mueller says - no collusion. So, now it's time to put all this behind us, and move on to solving real issues facing our country.Click the link below to read this week's blog post on where I think we go from here. ## [I'd Rather Be Us Than Them](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jilujjil-kujkulhluu-u/)
We Republicans face ongoing challenges when it comes to winning elections in America nowadays. But in my view, our problems pale in comparison to what the Democrats face. ## [Yes, I'm Running](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jilujjil-kujkulhluu-n/)

I'm on the blog today setting the record straight.
